batch_goal: Capture the first verified manual static source snapshots for selected high-confidence groups so real official-source confirmation can begin.
user_visible_goal: After this batch is captured in the following PR, users will be closer to seeing real sample meeting dates, first-race times, and per-race times from official/approved source pages.
operation_goal: Confirm that the manual source snapshot schema can record official source evidence without adding live fetching, parser runtime, or betting-adjacent data.
first_batch_reason: These are mostly centralized operator/authority sources.
They are better suited for validating the manual snapshot workflow before moving into heavily operator-split countries.
They cover annual fixture, rolling fixture, daily race info, racecard, and season/declaration-style source patterns.

selected_groups.user_visible_expected_result: Users should eventually see a meeting date, first race time, per-race times, and an official source link for the Japan Racing Association group.
selected_groups.operation_expected_result: Maintainers must verify that the JRA source page can support a normalized sample without storing raw HTML or adding parser/runtime code.

singapore_status.reason: Singapore is not an active timetable target.
singapore_status.next_action: keep legacy inventory only unless racing resumes or an approved successor source exists
